name: Unavailable appointment reschedule
description: Patient attempts to reschedule an appointment to a fully booked date.
goal: Reschedule an upcoming appointment to next Tuesday, then accept a later date if Tuesday is unavailable.
behavior: Request to move the appointment to the soonest available Tuesday
Express willingness to consider other available dates if Tuesday is booked
success_criteria: Agent checks the availability for the requested Tuesday
Agent informs Monica that the requested date is fully booked
Agent offers alternative dates for rescheduling within the same week
Patient accepts a new appointment date provided by the agent
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests to change an upcoming appointment to a date that is not available.
